subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! For some time the way had been barred, the path cut off, and all wayfarers forbidden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء چندی بود که سبیل مسدود و طریق مقطوع و فاصدان ممنوع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual springtime, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation
